Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

total_green = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
total_red = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'R')
print(f"\nTotal green pixels: {total_green}")
print(f"Total red pixels: {total_red}")

# Check white shape children
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 135:
        print(f"\nWhite shape children: {n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
